reviewer_safe_delta: ToolHive gives the security package a second MCP/deployment-trust row and the first one in that family with exact AVID support plus vendor-advisory-grade remediation visibility, so the package no longer relies on Playwright MCP alone for seeded trust-boundary breadth.
must_keep_caution: Keep the home-folder-access precondition explicit, do not infer exploitation in the wild, and do not turn two MCP/deployment rows into broad MCP-ecosystem prevalence rhetoric.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Either one independent public-security analysis mapped directly to ToolHive or Playwright MCP, one exact ATLAS same-case join for either, or one non-MCP supply-chain/dependency-trust public case.
